result.stderr:
Kifa.Tools.FileUtil 5.5.5+9aaf8166cfb685238462b682dd5a9c56a442da9d
Copyright © 2021 Kimi-Arthur

  clean        Clean file entries.

  rm           Remove the FILE. Can be either logic path like: /Software/... or
               real path like: local:desk/Software....

  cp           Copy FILE1 to FILE2. The files will be linked.

  ls           List files and folders in the FOLDER.

  upload       Upload file to a cloud location.

  add          Add file entry.

  get          Get files.

  touch        Touch file.

  normalize    Rename the file with proper normalization.

  import       Import files from /Downloads folder with resource id.

  trash        Move the file to trash.

  rm-empty     Remove empty folders recursively.

  decode       Decode file.

  dedup        Deduplicate file entries.

  migrate      Migrate Google Drive files to a new cell and quick check on it.

  link         Link $ folders to create proper directory structure.

  extract      Extract files and add to system.

  truncate     Special command to truncate the last byte of the files in case it
               ends with \0.

  help         Display more information on a specific command.

  version      Display version information.

commands.payload:
Kifa.Tools.FileUtil 5.5.5+9aaf8166cfb685238462b682dd5a9c56a442da9d
Copyright © 2021 Kimi-Arthur

  clean        Clean file entries.

  rm           Remove the FILE. Can be either logic path like: /Software/... or
               real path like: local:desk/Software....

  cp           Copy FILE1 to FILE2. The files will be linked.

  ls           List files and folders in the FOLDER.

  upload       Upload file to a cloud location.

  add          Add file entry.

  get          Get files.

  touch        Touch file.

  normalize    Rename the file with proper normalization.

  import       Import files from /Downloads folder with resource id.

  trash        Move the file to trash.

  rm-empty     Remove empty folders recursively.

  decode       Decode file.

  dedup        Deduplicate file entries.

  migrate      Migrate Google Drive files to a new cell and quick check on it.

  link         Link $ folders to create proper directory structure.

  extract      Extract files and add to system.

  truncate     Special command to truncate the last byte of the files in case it
               ends with \0.

  help         Display more information on a specific command.

  version      Display version information.

Kifa.Tools.FileUtil 5.5.5+9aaf8166cfb685238462b682dd5a9c56a442da9d
Copyright © 2021 Kimi-Arthur

  -q, --quick          Check file in quick mode. Won't update registration.

  -f, --force          Check file integrity even if it is already registered.

  -m, --mirror-host    Mirror the file to the given host before checking if
                       needed.

  -k, --keep-mirror    Keep the mirror version after checking.

  -v, --verbose        Show most detailed log.

  -V, --non-verbose    Show least detailed log.

  --config             Use an alternative config file.

  -y, --yes            Always yes to all confirmations with default value (not
                       always yes).

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.

  value pos. 0         Required. Target file(s) to upload.

  -d, --delete-source     Remove source if upload is successful. Won't remove
                          valid cloud version.

  -q, --quick             Finish quickly by not verifying validity of
                          destination.

  -t, --targets           Targets to upload to, in the format of 'google.v1',
                          'swiss.v2' or combined 'google.v1,swiss.v2' etc.

  -c, --use-cache         Use cache to help upload.

  -l, --download-local    Download the file to local.

  -s, --skip-uploaded     Skip potentially uploaded files.

  -a, --include-all       Include all files already registered.

  -v, --verbose           Show most detailed log.

  -V, --non-verbose       Show least detailed log.

  --config                Use an alternative config file.

  -y, --yes               Always yes to all confirmations with default value
                          (not always yes).

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.

  value pos. 0            Required. Target file(s) to upload.
